completed_work: Added SELF-MODEL schema documentation and prefix/immutability rules.
Added CAP-0001, GAP-0001, and VERIFY-20260705-0001 seed records.
Added CAP/GAP/VERIFY writer scripts and self-model validation/audit tests.
key_decisions: Canonical architecture uses SELF-MODEL, SELF-AUDIT, VERIFY, PLAN, and GOVERNED IMPROVEMENT rather than claiming AI-Lab is self-aware.
Capability records require structured evidence references and full commit hashes.
VERIFY v1 is attributed testimony, not yet an execution instrument.
SELF-AUDIT v1 checks warrant state by resolving the latest admission verdict for warrant evidence.
next_actions: Add build_self_model.py to generate SELF_MODEL.json as aggregation-only from CAP/GAP/VERIFY records.
risks: VERIFY records are still manually transcribed evidence in v1; future writer should run commands and capture output itself.
Freshness uses commit-distance proxy in v1; path-sensitive mechanism/test freshness is deferred.
summary_text: SELF-MODEL v1 first slice is implemented. The repo now has a mechanism-honest self-model layer that avoids canonical self-awareness claims and instead uses SELF-MODEL, SELF-AUDIT, VERIFY, PLAN, and governed-improvement vocabulary. The first slice added ai_lab/documentation/self_model.py, SELF_MODEL_SCHEMA.md, CAP-0001 for explicit L0 latest-context inclusion, GAP-0001 for automatic L0 discovery, VERIFY-20260705-0001 as attributed test-run evidence, writer scripts for CAP/GAP/VERIFY records, and tests covering validation, full-hash discipline, recorded_by attribution, content_hash warnings, evidence-path errors, and latest-warrant-state warnings. Focused self-model tests passed and the full suite passed with 276 tests before commit 075e0da.
